scripts.docker:dev: DB_FILE=strata-dev.db node scripts/check-ports.mjs && STRATA_ENV=development node scripts/gen-version.mjs all && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose build --parallel && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose up
scripts.docker:reset: DB_FILE=strata-dev.db node scripts/check-ports.mjs && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose down && rm -f backend/.data/strata-dev.db && STRATA_ENV=development node scripts/gen-version.mjs all && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose build --parallel && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose up
scripts.docker:nuke: DB_FILE=strata-dev.db node scripts/check-ports.mjs && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose down && rm -f backend/.data/strata-dev.db && docker image prune -a -f && STRATA_ENV=development node scripts/gen-version.mjs all && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose build --no-cache --parallel && DB_FILE=strata-dev.db docker-compose up
scripts.docker:prod: DB_FILE=strata.db NODE_ENV=production RESTART_POLICY=always sh -c 'export VERSION_OVERRIDE=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null) && node scripts/gen-version.mjs all && docker-compose up --build -d'
